sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Glaukos: Fourth Quarter Financial Highlights
feed.summary: Glaukos Corp. reported a net loss of $133.7 million, or $2.32 per share, for the fourth quarter, with an adjusted loss of 28 cents per share, missing analyst expectations. Despite the loss, the company generated $143.1 million in revenue, exceeding forecasts. For the full year, Glaukos recorded a $187.7 million loss and $507.4 million in revenue, and projects 2027 revenue between $600 million and $620 million.

feed.title: NanoViricides: Fiscal Second Quarter Earnings Overview
feed.summary: NanoViricides Inc. reported a net loss of $2.2 million for its fiscal second quarter, which translates to a loss of 11 cents per share. The company, headquartered in Shelton, Connecticut, disclosed these financial results. This article provides a brief overview of their recent earnings.

feed.title: Popeyes Is Losing the Chicken Sandwich Wars. Its Comeback Plan Starts With Low-Performing Locations
feed.summary: Popeyes, once a leader in the chicken sandwich market, is experiencing a decline in sales and losing ground to competitors like Raising Cane's, Dave's Hot Chicken, and Hangry Joe's Hot Chicken & Wings. Its parent company, Restaurant Brands International (RBI), reported nearly a 5% drop in U.S. sales for Popeyes, marking its fourth consecutive quarterly slide. To address this, RBI has brought in new leadership and plans to implement a multi-pronged strategy focusing on supporting franchisees and improving the performance of its lowest-performing locations.

feed.title: Cadence Design Systems Inc (CDNS) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Highlights: Record Growth and AI Innovations Propel Success
feed.summary: Cadence Design Systems Inc (CDNS) reported strong financial performance in Q4 2025, with a 14% revenue growth and 45% operating margin, driven by record backlog and advancements in AI solutions. Despite this success, the company faces potential challenges from limited visibility in the hardware pipeline for the second half of 2026, export control regulations, and competition in the AI space. Executives emphasized that AI tools are increasing demand for Cadence's existing software and hardware, leading to significant productivity gains for customers, and the company plans to continue investing in R&D while leveraging AI internally.

feed.title: Roth Capital lowers its price target on Live Nation Entertainment, Inc. (LYV) to $174 and maintains a buy rating
feed.summary: Roth Capital has reduced its price target for Live Nation Entertainment (LYV) to $174, while simultaneously reiterating a buy rating for the stock. This adjustment suggests a continued positive outlook on the company despite the lowered price target.

feed.title: Lean into the ride on the open road or closed track with zūmo XT3 from Garmin
feed.summary: Garmin has introduced its new zūmo XT3 motorcycle GPS, designed for both touring and sport riding. Available in 4.7-inch and 6-inch displays, this rugged device features a live lean angle gauge, expanded mapping options including off-road routes, and integration with the Tread smartphone app for ride summaries and group tracking. It also offers a Garmin Performance Package for track enthusiasts, providing lap timers and drag racing metrics.

feed.title: Competitive Analysis: Key Market Leaders and New Entrants in the Flavors and Fragrances Industry
feed.summary: The flavors and fragrances market is projected to reach $47.31 billion by 2030, growing at a CAGR of 5.5%, driven by evolving consumer preferences for personalized and sustainable products. Key trends include demand for natural ingredients, functional fragrances, and bio-based aroma compounds. Major players like International Flavors & Fragrances Inc. and Givaudan SA are focusing on innovation and strategic acquisitions to enhance their market position.

feed.title: Short Interest in Old National Bancorp (NASDAQ:ONB) Decreases By 13.8%
feed.summary: Old National Bancorp (NASDAQ:ONB) experienced a 13.8% decrease in short interest as of January 30th, totaling 17,433,745 shares. This represents 4.5% of the stock and a short-interest ratio of 5.1 days. Despite an insider selling a significant portion of their shares, institutional investors have increased their holdings, and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target price of $27.36.

feed.title: Hormel Foods sells whole-bird turkey business, forecasts continued organic sales growth (HRL:NYSE)
feed.summary: Hormel Foods (HRL) has announced the sale of its whole-bird turkey business to Life-Science Innovations. Concurrently, the company projects approximately $3 billion in net sales for the first quarter of fiscal 2026, which would represent its fifth consecutive quarter of year-over-year organic growth.

feed.title: Is AMETEK the Stealth Industrial Winner US Investors Are Missing?
feed.summary: AMETEK Inc. is positioned as a stealth industrial winner, consistently achieving double-digit earnings growth and raising guidance, despite being perceived as a "boring industrial" by many U.S. investors. The company's focus on high-margin electronics and automation, coupled with a disciplined acquisition strategy, drives its strong performance. While it trades at a valuation premium compared to traditional cyclicals, analysts view it as a quality growth stock with a robust business model, suitable for various U.S. investment portfolios.

feed.title: Rayonier (RYN) Gets a Hold from RBC Capital
feed.summary: RBC Capital analyst Matt McKellar maintained a Hold rating on Rayonier (RYN) with a price target of $26.00. This rating comes despite the company reporting a quarterly revenue of $177.53 million and a net profit of $43.19 million for the quarter ending September 30. Insider sentiment for RYN is negative, with an increase in insider selling over the past quarter.

feed.title: Molina Healthcare (MOH) Gets a Hold from Truist Financial
feed.summary: Truist Financial analyst David S Macdonald maintained a Hold rating on Molina Healthcare (MOH) with a price target of $145.00. This comes as corporate insider sentiment is neutral, despite a director recently purchasing shares. The company reported a Q4 revenue of $11.38 billion and a GAAP net loss of $160 million.

feed.title: Global Payments Is Quietly Rewiring How You Pay — Here’s Why It Matters
feed.summary: Global Payments is a U.S.-based fintech company that is rapidly shifting its strategy towards AI, software, and faster payments to remain competitive in the evolving payments landscape. While consumers might not directly interact with Global Payments, its technological advancements impact transaction speed, approval rates, and available payment options at various retail and online touchpoints. The company is focused on software-led payments, AI-powered fraud tools, and omnichannel solutions, aiming to transition from a pure transaction processor to a software-forward platform amidst intense competition and pricing pressures.

feed.title: Roth Capital Lowers its Price Target on Live Nation Entertainment, Inc. (LYV) to $174 and Maintains a Buy Rating
feed.summary: Roth Capital has reduced its price target for Live Nation Entertainment (LYV) to $174 from $176, while reiterating a Buy rating. The firm noted renewed investor interest in live events, considering them resistant to AI disruption and less exposed to the DOJ antitrust lawsuit. Live Nation also recently announced the acquisition of ForumNet Group, including Unipol Forum, a major live music and sports arena in Italy, with plans for upgrades and sustainability initiatives.

feed.title: Bitcoin Miner Soluna Expands Behind-the-Meter Capacity in Texas via Blockware Pact
feed.summary: Soluna, a bitcoin miner, has announced an expansion of its behind-the-meter capacity in Texas through a new partnership with Blockware. This move aims to enhance its mining operations in the region.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Lowers its Price Target on News Corporation (NWS) to $32.40 and Maintains an Overweight Rating
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has lowered its price target for News Corporation (NWS) to $32.40 from $38 but maintained an Overweight rating, following the company's strong second-quarter fiscal 2026 results. News Corp reported revenue of $2.36 billion, exceeding estimates, with CEO Robert Thomson highlighting 6% revenue growth and 9% profitability increase year-over-year, driven by Dow Jones and Digital Real Estate Services. Citi also adjusted its price target for NWS, lowering it to $39 from $40, while keeping a Buy rating.

feed.title: SGH, Steel Dynamics bid $10.6 billion for BlueScope Steel in ‘best and final’ offer
feed.summary: SGH Ltd and Steel Dynamics have increased their takeover bid for Australian steelmaker BlueScope Steel to A$15 billion ($10.62 billion), calling it a "best and final" offer. The new proposal of A$32.35 per share, an 8% increase from their previous rejected bid, caused BlueScope's shares to jump. The acquiring companies plan to split BlueScope's operations, with SGH taking the Australian units and Steel Dynamics acquiring the North American assets.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Starts Coverage on TeraWulf Inc. (WULF)
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley initiated coverage on TeraWulf Inc. (WULF) with an Overweight rating and a $37 price target, citing the company's success in securing data center contracts and developing power infrastructure. TeraWulf, a bitcoin mining company utilizing eco-friendly energy sources, recently expanded its capacity through new acquisitions and reported an 87% year-on-year revenue increase. The stock has seen a 25.82% year-to-date gain as of February 11, 2026.

feed.title: Natuzzi postpones share capital decision and ratifies board appointment
feed.summary: Natuzzi S.p.A. shareholders met and decided to postpone a decision on reducing the company's share capital, following reported losses. The matter will be revisited after the approval of financial statements for the year ended December 31, 2025. Additionally, shareholders ratified the appointment of Pietro Labriola as a non-executive director, whose term will last until the approval of the company's financial statements as of December 31, 2026.

feed.title: OSS (One Stop Systems, NASDAQ) down 4.04% after hours 17 Feb 2026: AI edge demand offers upside
feed.summary: One Stop Systems (OSS) stock fell 4.04% in after-hours trading on February 17, 2026, closing at $8.21 USD, following sustained interest due to its positioning in AI and edge-compute hardware. Despite mixed analyst signals and current losses reflected in its negative EPS and P/E, Meyka AI projects a one-year target of $11.48 USD for OSS, indicating a potential upside of 39.95%, driven by expected product wins and the demand for AI at the edge. Investors are advised to watch for upcoming earnings on March 19, 2026, and potential contract announcements as key catalysts.

feed.title: Rush Enterprises (NASDAQ:RUSHA) Exceeds Q4 CY2025 Expectations
feed.summary: Rush Enterprises (NASDAQ:RUSH.A) reported Q4 CY2025 results, with revenue exceeding market expectations at $1.77 billion despite an 11.8% year-on-year decline. The company's GAAP EPS of $0.81 beat analyst consensus by 17.1%. For the full year 2025, Rush Enterprises achieved revenues of $7.4 billion and net income of $263.8 million, or $3.27 per diluted share, and declared a cash dividend of $0.19 per share.

feed.title: Krawczyk, Microchip Technology SVP, sells $345k in stock By Investing.com
feed.summary: Joseph R. Krawczyk II, Senior VP at Microchip Technology INC, sold 4,400 shares of common stock for $345,743. This transaction occurred as the stock trades near its 52-week high, with the company maintaining a 25-year dividend payment streak and analysts revising earnings estimates upward. Despite appearing overvalued by InvestingPro, Microchip has recent strategic moves, including an $800 million convertible senior notes offering and expanded edge AI solutions.

feed.title: Berenberg Bank Sticks to Their Hold Rating for Ecolab (ECL)
feed.summary: Berenberg Bank has reaffirmed its Hold rating for Ecolab (ECL) with a price target of $299.00. This rating aligns with Deutsche Bank's recent Hold, while Barclays maintained a Buy rating. Ecolab reported quarterly revenue of $4.17 billion and a net profit of $585 million, and insider sentiment on the stock is neutral.

feed.title: Tesla to integrate Grok AI chatbot into cars across the UK and Europe amid regulatory scrutiny (TSLA:NASDAQ)
feed.summary: Tesla announced it will integrate xAI's Grok AI chatbot into its in-car infotainment systems in the UK and eight other European markets. This move comes as Tesla faced weaker European sales in 2025 and amidst ongoing regulatory scrutiny. The integration aims to enhance the in-car experience for users in these regions.

feed.title: Tesla dodges 30-day suspension in California after removing Autopilot
feed.summary: Tesla will avoid a 30-day suspension of its sales and manufacturing licenses in California after it agreed to stop using the term "Autopilot" in its vehicle marketing within the state. This decision by the California Department of Motor Vehicles (DMV) concludes a nearly three-year-long case regarding deceptive marketing practices. Tesla has also previously modified its use of "Full Self-Driving" to "Full Self-Driving (Supervised)" and recently discontinued Autopilot entirely in the U.S. and Canada to encourage adoption of its FSD subscription.

feed.title: Most finance chiefs expect larger IT budgets, ‘collapsing’ staff growth: Gartner
feed.summary: A Gartner survey reveals that three-quarters of CFOs globally anticipate increased technology budgets this year, with nearly half expecting rises of 10% or more, driven by digital transformation, AI adoption, and cybersecurity demands. Simultaneously, staff growth expectations are predicted to collapse from 6% in 2025 to 2% in 2026, indicating a strategic shift towards automation and AI for productivity gains over increased headcount. While AI investment currently remains modest for most finance departments, a significant boost in AI spending is projected, as CFOs increasingly view AI as a broader enterprise capability for automation and enhanced planning.

feed.title: (ISO) Strategic Equity Report (ISO:CA)
feed.summary: This strategic equity report for IsoEnergy Ltd. (ISO:CA), published on February 17, 2026, includes trading plans with specific buy, target, and stop loss prices. It provides AI-generated ratings for near, mid, and long terms, alongside a list of recent articles related to ISO:CA's performance and trading.

feed.title: US Tech Stocks Slide on AI Concerns; Cognizant, Accenture, Wipro ADRs Under Pressure
feed.summary: US tech stocks, including ADRs of Cognizant, Accenture, and Wipro, are experiencing a downturn due to growing investor concerns about AI-driven disruption and a slowdown in enterprise spending. The rapid advancements in AI are raising questions about the demand for traditional IT services and impacting growth projections and valuations for many companies in the sector. While short-term volatility is expected, the long-term outlook suggests that companies that adapt quickly to AI transformation will likely emerge as leaders.

feed.title: Genmab Launches DKK 725 Million Share Buy-Back to Cover RSU Commitments
feed.summary: Genmab, a global biotech company specializing in antibody-based cancer therapies, initiated a share buy-back program worth DKK 725 million. This program, running from February 18 to March 31, 2026, aims to cover obligations under its Restricted Stock Unit scheme and manage share dilution. The company plans to repurchase up to 342,130 shares, adding to its existing treasury shares.

feed.title: Sprouts Earnings: What To Look For From SFM
feed.summary: Sprouts Farmers Market (NASDAQ: SFM) is set to announce its earnings results this Thursday. Analysts anticipate a 7.9% year-on-year revenue growth to $2.15 billion and adjusted earnings of $0.89 per share. Despite missing revenue expectations last quarter, Sprouts has generally exceeded top-line expectations historically, and analysts have reaffirmed their estimates.

feed.title: Labcorp Holdings (LH) Margin Improvement Reinforces Bullish Earnings Recovery Narrative
feed.summary: Labcorp Holdings (LH) achieved significant margin improvement in FY 2025, with revenue reaching US$3,515.8 million in Q4 and trailing twelve-month EPS at US$10.53, leading to a 6.3% net profit margin. This rebound in earnings follows a five-year decline, fueling a bullish narrative supported by new tests, efficiency gains, and recent acquisitions. However, skeptics point to a P/E ratio above the industry average, a high debt load, and modest revenue growth, suggesting execution risk remains.

feed.title: Earnings To Watch: Quanta (PWR) Reports Q4 Results Tomorrow
feed.summary: Quanta Services (NYSE:PWR) is scheduled to report its Q4 results before market hours this Thursday. Analysts project a revenue increase of 12.4% year-on-year to $7.37 billion and adjusted earnings of $3.02 per share. The company has a mixed record on revenue estimates, missing twice in the last two years, though sentiment in the construction and engineering sector has been positive recently.

feed.title: Salesforce vs. Oracle: Which Cloud Software Stock Is the Better Bet?
feed.summary: This article compares Salesforce (CRM) and Oracle (ORCL) as investment options in the cloud enterprise software market, evaluating their fundamentals, growth prospects, and market challenges. Salesforce is highlighted for its AI-driven strategy and strong financial performance, while Oracle is recognized for its cloud infrastructure growth but faces execution challenges and valuation concerns. Ultimately, Salesforce is recommended as the better investment due to its accelerated AI growth, unified platform strategy, superior profitability prospects, and lower valuation.

feed.title: Restaurant Brands China JV Adds New Angle To QSR Valuation Story
feed.summary: Restaurant Brands International (NYSE:QSR) has finalized a joint venture with CPE to expand its Burger King brand in China, granting exclusive development rights for 20 years. This partnership is viewed as a significant element in QSR's global growth strategy, particularly for expanding in large, complex markets. While the stock has seen long-term gains, recent performance shows a short-term decline, setting a dynamic backdrop as the China expansion begins.

feed.title: GRACO INC SEC 10-K Report
feed.summary: Graco Inc. (GGG) has released its 2025 10-K report, showcasing robust financial performance with net sales reaching $2,236.6 million and net earnings of $521.8 million. The company's growth is attributed to strategic acquisitions, product innovation, and operational efficiency, despite challenges like increased product costs and global economic risks. Graco plans to continue its focus on new product development, global expansion, and further acquisitions, alongside maintaining its capital management strategies including share repurchases and increased dividends.

feed.title: OSHKOSH CORP SEC 10-K Report
feed.summary: Oshkosh Corporation has released its 2025 Form 10-K report, revealing a decrease in net sales and operating income compared to 2024, primarily due to lower organic sales volume and higher costs. Despite this, the company saw growth in its Vocational segment, introduced several new products, and increased its quarterly dividend. Oshkosh anticipates consolidated sales of $11.0 billion in 2026, alongside ongoing challenges related to market volatility, supply chain risks, and cybersecurity threats.

feed.title: Texas Pacific Land Data Center Pivot Meets Lofty Valuation And Insider Buying
feed.summary: Texas Pacific Land (NYSE:TPL) has entered a US$50 million partnership with Bolt Data & Energy to develop data centers on its West Texas land, diversifying its business beyond oil and gas royalties. This initiative, alongside continued share accumulation by major holder Horizon Kinetics, signals strong insider confidence despite the company's lofty valuation. Investors are advised to monitor the execution of these projects and cash flow quality, given the high P/E ratio and non-cash earnings.

feed.title: Opendoor (OPEN) Reports Earnings Tomorrow: What To Expect
feed.summary: Opendoor (OPEN) is scheduled to announce its earnings results tomorrow, with analysts expecting a 45.1% year-on-year revenue decline to $595 million and an adjusted loss of -$0.09 per share. Despite a history of beating revenue estimates, the company's stock has been down 32.6% over the last month, contrasting with a generally flat performance in the consumer discretionary - real estate services segment. Investors will be watching closely to see if Opendoor can once again exceed expectations, given its recent performance and the mixed results from peers like Marcus & Millichap and Zillow.

feed.title: Portland General Electric Company Announces Pricing of a Public Offering of 9,467,455 Shares of Common Stock
feed.summary: Portland General Electric Company (PGE) announced the pricing of a public offering of 9,467,455 shares of its common stock at $50.70 per share, through underwritten forward sale agreements with Wells Fargo Bank and Bank of America. The offering is expected to close on February 19, 2026, and the net proceeds will be used for general corporate purposes, including investment in renewable energy and repayment of indebtedness. The underwriters also have a 30-day option to purchase up to 1,380,670 additional shares.

feed.title: COHERENT CORP. CFO Sells 4,000 Shares
feed.summary: Sherri R. Luther, CFO of COHERENT CORP. (COHR), sold 4,000 shares of common stock on February 12, 2026, for a total of $870,954. The sale was made at a weighted average price of $217.7386 per share under a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. Following this transaction, Luther directly owns 72,475 shares of the company.

feed.title: Skyworks Earnings Beat Highlights Shifting Mix Beyond Smartphones
feed.summary: Skyworks Solutions (NasdaqGS:SWKS) reported quarterly earnings that surpassed Wall Street expectations, driven by strong performance in edge IoT, automotive, and data center segments. The company is strategically diversifying its business beyond its traditional mobile device focus, with design wins in Wi-Fi 7 and automotive connectivity. Skyworks stock is currently trading below its analyst target and Simply Wall St's fair value estimate, indicating potential undervaluation, though its dividend yield is not well covered by earnings.

feed.title: KeyCorp Stock Is Quietly Turning Into a High-Yield Bank Play
feed.summary: KeyCorp (KEY) is gaining traction among investors as a potential high-yield rebound play, driven by rising rate-cut expectations, an attractive dividend, and improving sentiment towards regional banks. While not a high-growth stock, its stability and dividend focus appeal to income-oriented investors, though it carries risks related to interest rate shifts and the broader US economy. The bank offers typical financial services for consumers and businesses, and its stock is viewed by analysts as a stable, income-generating component within a diversified portfolio.

feed.title: Integer Holdings (ITGR) Reports Q4: Everything You Need To Know Ahead Of Earnings
feed.summary: Integer Holdings (ITGR) is preparing to report its Q4 earnings this Thursday morning, with analysts expecting a 2.9% year-over-year revenue growth to $462.7 million and adjusted earnings of $1.70 per share. The medical technology company met revenue expectations last quarter but missed full-year EBITDA and slightly missed revenue guidance. Despite some healthcare equipment and supplies peers underperforming, Integer Holdings' stock is up 2.9% over the last month, heading into earnings with an average analyst price target of $85.57.

feed.title: Murphy Oil (MUR): Can This Quiet Cash Machine Beat Big Oil in 2026?
feed.summary: Murphy Oil Corporation (MUR) is presented as a mid-cap U.S. exploration and production company generating significant cash, increasing dividends, and executing stock buybacks. The article explores how MUR's performance is tied to North American crude prices and management's capital allocation strategy, posing the question of whether its upside justifies the inherent risk. It delves into analyst perspectives, social sentiment, and key drivers U.S. investors should consider when evaluating MUR for their portfolios.

feed.title: What To Expect From LegalZoom's (LZ) Q4 Earnings
feed.summary: LegalZoom (NASDAQ:LZ) is set to report its Q4 earnings this Thursday. Analysts anticipate a 14.2% year-on-year revenue growth to $184.6 million and adjusted earnings of $0.18 per share. Despite a strong history of exceeding revenue estimates, the company's stock has seen a 21.1% decline in the last month amidst broader struggles in the consumer internet sector due to economic uncertainties and AI concerns.

feed.title: Deere (DE) Q4 Earnings: What To Expect
feed.summary: Deere (DE) is set to report its Q4 earnings, with analysts expecting revenue growth of 6.7% year-on-year to $9.08 billion and adjusted earnings of $2.06 per share. The company has a strong track record of beating revenue estimates, and recent peer performance in the heavy machinery segment suggests a positive outlook. Investor sentiment for the sector is positive, with Deere's stock up 18.1% over the last month.

feed.title: Ali Dibadj Sells 127,632 Shares of Janus Henderson Group (NYSE:JHG) Stock
feed.summary: Janus Henderson Group CEO Ali Dibadj sold 127,632 shares of the company's stock for over $6.27 million, reducing his holding by 22.13%. The sale, executed at an average price of $49.12 per share, was disclosed in an SEC filing. Despite this insider selling, the company recently reported strong earnings, exceeding expectations with $2.01 EPS and $996.6 million in revenue, leading the stock to trade near a 12-month high.

feed.title: Live Nation (LYV) Q4 Earnings Report Preview: What To Look For
feed.summary: Live Nation Entertainment (LYV) is set to report its Q4 earnings this Thursday afternoon. Analysts anticipate a 7.4% year-on-year revenue growth to $6.10 billion, and an adjusted loss of -$1.05 per share. Despite missing revenue estimates in four of the last two years, the company's stock is up 12.5% over the last month, heading into earnings with an average analyst price target of $170.10.

feed.title: US Bancorp Stock Just Flashed a Big Signal – Are You Missing It?
feed.summary: US Bancorp's stock is gaining attention due to analyst upgrades, rate-cut expectations, and a strategic shift towards fee-based banking. The article provides a concise analysis of the factors influencing the stock, including interest rates, credit quality, and digital banking initiatives, urging investors to understand these dynamics before making investment decisions. It highlights both the pros, such as a strong U.S. footprint and consistent dividends, and the cons, including exposure to economic cycles and regulatory risks.

feed.title: Live Nation (LYV) Q4 Earnings Report Preview: What To Look For
feed.summary: Live Nation Entertainment (LYV) is set to report its Q4 earnings this Thursday. Analysts anticipate a 7.4% year-on-year revenue growth to $6.10 billion, a significant rebound from last year's decrease, despite the company missing revenue estimates in four of the last eight quarters. Investors will be watching key metrics, especially after a mixed Q3 performance and the performance of peers in the leisure facilities segment.
